terms-and-conditions.title: Terms and Conditions
terms-and-conditions.content-before-link: By clicking "I accept" below, you agree that your use of this Haptics Studio and any companion VR application is subject to the Meta Platform Technologies

bugreport.title: Report a Bug
bugreport.subtitle: For support or feedback, please reach out using the GitHub issues pages. Feel free to attach logs and screenshot, but please only include information you are comfortable sharing with us.
bugreport.template-subtitle: To help us better understand your situation, please use this template to describe your request.
bugreport.template-body:
Version:
Haptics Studio v%{version} (%{platform})

Current situation:
Describe the problem you're facing.

Expected behavior:
Insert a description of what you would expect.

updater.title: New Version Available!
updater.update-available: Haptics Studio v%{version} includes improvements and bug fixes.

home.start-banner-subtitle: Explore our Learning Section for interactive tutorials, design guidelines, and developer documentation to get started with designing Haptics

projects.empty-navigator-subtitle: Drag and drop a single audio file or a folder of assets to start
projects.cta-select-clip: Select a clip or add a new file

guidance.title: What would you like to do?
guidance.audio-text: For complex designs where audio defines intricate haptic feedback. Start by adding Audio files.
guidance.pen-text: For less complex designs such as UI interactions or if there is no audio. Start drawing your haptics.

editor.analysis-confirm-body:
This will overwrite your current changes.
Do you want to proceed?
editor.analysis-multiple-body:
This will overwrite your current changes in all the selected clips.
Do you want to proceed?
editor.remove-clip-body: Do you want to remove this clip from the project?
editor.remove-clips-body: Do you want to remove these clips from the project?
editor.extension-guidance: Default envelope to match clip duration
editor.paste-emphasis-skipped: Emphasis points with amplitude values below the destination envelope were omitted

export.title: Export
export.format-selection: Select the right format to integrate in your project.
export.package-hint: Your project will be packaged including only the selected clips and the chosen formats above, ready to be shared.
export.format-title-haptic: For Game Engine & Audio Middleware Integration
export.format-hint-haptic: Export your haptic clips as a .haptic file for seamless integration with Haptics SDK (Unity | Unreal) or FMOD (Unity | Unreal).
export.format-hint-ahap:
Export your haptic clips as .ahap files, for native integration on Apple devices using Core Haptics.
To ensure that your haptic files are optimized for playback on Apple devices, your clip will be exported as two files:
TRANSIENTS.AHAP and CONTINUOUS.AHAP.

For more information on how to play these files on Apple devices, please refer to the Apple Developer Documentation.
export.format-hint-wav: Export your haptic clip as a .wav file for platforms that support direct PCM or .wav playback APIs.
export.format-hint-android: Export your haptic clip as a JSON file for manual integration, or copy a code snippet with the Vibrator API implementation.

markers.instructions-hint: from the Tool Bar to create a new marker.

error.dataValidationFailed: Something went wrong, the haptic pattern seems corrupted, please try again.

devices.title: Devices
devices.cta-pair-new-device: Install the Haptics Studio VR Application or a compatible companion app on your device to connect.
devices.auth-code-requested: To establish a connection between Desktop and VR App please input the following code when prompted:
